allow: PowerShell(Set-Location ..; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 256,256; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.SmoothingMode = 'AntiAlias'; $g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(255, 24, 24, 28\)\); $brush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush\([System.Drawing.Color]::White\); $font = New-Object System.Drawing.Font 'Segoe UI', 130, \([System.Drawing.FontStyle]::Bold\); $sf = New-Object System.Drawing.StringFormat; $sf.Alignment = 'Center'; $sf.LineAlignment = 'Center'; $g.DrawString\('W', $font, $brush, \(New-Object System.Drawing.RectangleF\(0,0,256,256\)\), $sf\); $bmp.Save\("$pwd\\app-icon.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); 'wrote app-icon.png')

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "src-tauri\\target\\release\\writingtool.exe","src-tauri\\target\\release\\bundle\\msi\\WritingTool_0.1.0_x64_en-US.msi","src-tauri\\target\\release\\bundle\\nsis\\WritingTool_0.1.0_x64-setup.exe" | Select-Object Name, @{n='Size';e={"{0:N2} MB" -f \($_.Length / 1MB\)}}, FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 512,512; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.SmoothingMode = 'HighQuality'; $g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(255, 10, 10, 12\)\); $brush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush\([System.Drawing.Color]::White\); $g.FillEllipse\($brush, 192, 192, 128, 128\); $bmp.Save\("$pwd\\app-icon.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); 'wrote app-icon.png \(black square + white dot, 512x512\)')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d['type'], d['path']\) for d in data]")
